name: @omadia/usage-telemetry
description: Cross-cutting LLM token-usage + cost telemetry for the omadia middleware. Captures every Anthropic call (orchestrator, sub-agents, and the Haiku background extras/verifier) via a process-level singleton recorder backed by the shared Neon graphPool, computes per-call USD cost from a model price table, and exposes aggregate queries for the cost dashboard. No-ops gracefully when no pool is wired (in-memory KG mode).
